x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Operations Workspace is the surface where DEX AI insights are presented to agents in context. Without SOW, AI insights are generated but never seen by the people who need them.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate either (a) Category + Subcategory or (b) Service + Service Offering + Configuration Item on all incidents. Enforce via mandatory field policy or assignment group rules. Target: ≥80% fill on closed incidents in the trailing 12 months. Note: the OOB default value "Inquiry/Help" for Category provides no classification signal and is excluded from scoring.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c07
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Operations Workspace is the surface where DEX AI insights are presented to agents in context. Without SOW, AI insights are generated but never seen by the people who need them.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Incident Classification Signal</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var total = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    total.addQuery('state', 7);
    total.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    total.addAggregate('COUNT');
    total.query();
    var totalCount = total.next() ? parseInt(total.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (totalCount === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'No closed incidents found in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed incident data available to assess classification signal for Predictive Intelligence training.'
        };
    }

    var pathA = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    pathA.addQuery('state', 7);
    pathA.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    pathA.addQuery('category', '!=', '');
    pathA.addQuery('category', '!=', 'Inquiry/Help');
    pathA.addQuery('subcategory', '!=', '');
    pathA.addAggregate('COUNT');
    pathA.query();
    var pathACount = pathA.next() ? parseInt(pathA.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var pathAPct = Math.round((pathACount / totalCount) * 100);

    var pathB = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    pathB.addQuery('state', 7);
    pathB.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    pathB.addQuery('business_service', '!=', '');
    pathB.addQuery('service_offering', '!=', '');
    pathB.addQuery('cmdb_ci', '!=', '');
    pathB.addAggregate('COUNT');
    pathB.query();
    var pathBCount = pathB.next() ? parseInt(pathB.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;
    var pathBPct = Math.round((pathBCount / totalCount) * 100);

    var actualValue = 'Total: ' + totalCount + ' | Category+Subcategory: ' + pathAPct + '% | Service+SO+CI: ' + pathBPct + '%';
    var bestPct = Math.max(pathAPct, pathBPct);

    if (bestPct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Sufficient classification signal for Predictive Intelligence training. Best path at ' + bestPct + '%.' };
    } else if (bestPct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Classification signal partial at ' + bestPct + '% (target: 80%). Predictive Intelligence routing accuracy will be reduced.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Insufficient classification signal. Category+Subcategory: ' + pathAPct + '%, Service+SO+CI: ' + pathBPct + '%. Both below 50% — Predictive Intelligence will produce unreliable routing recommendations.' };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005950</number>
<order>110</order>
<remediation_guidance>Populate either (a) Category + Subcategory or (b) Service + Service Offering + Configuration Item on all incidents. Enforce via mandatory field policy or assignment group rules. Target: ≥80% fill on closed incidents in the trailing 12 months. Note: the OOB default value "Inquiry/Help" for Category provides no classification signal and is excluded from scoring.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c07</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
